scripts.build:recorded: VITE_EBRT_RECORDED_ONLY=true tsc -b && VITE_EBRT_RECORDED_ONLY=true vite build && node scripts/stage-sites-build.mjs recorded
scripts.build:public-live: VITE_EBRT_RECORDED_ONLY=false VITE_EBRT_PUBLIC_LIVE=true tsc -b && VITE_EBRT_RECORDED_ONLY=false VITE_EBRT_PUBLIC_LIVE=true vite build && node scripts/stage-sites-build.mjs public-live
